name: SP-404 MK2
use: Sampling, beat making, live pad performance, TR-REC patterns, EFX motion rec, DJ mode, skip-back sampling
overview: Performance sampler: 16 pads × 10 banks (A–J), TR-REC pattern sequencer, dual FX buses (BUS 1/2/3/4), DJ mixer mode, EFX motion recording, skip-back sampling (SBS), CHROMATIC mode, BOUNCE, and a full shortcut system. Version 5.50.
workflow: Play samples: Bank [A/F]–[E/J] to select bank → press pads [1–16] to play samples. [SHIFT] + [REVERSE] + pad = toggle mute on/off

Sampling: [EXT SOURCE] → set input level (watch VU meter, aim for 0 dB peak) → [REC] → press a pad → play/sing into mic/line in → [REC] to save. [SHIFT] + [RECORD SETTING] for auto-gain, count-in, END SNAP
Set tempo: [SHIFT] + Pad[11] = TAP TEMPO (tap [SUB PAD] button repeatedly to lock BPM to your taps). Or during recording: [SHIFT] + [CTRL1] knob = BPM

TR-REC (step recording): [PATTERN SELECT] → press empty red pad to start → [REMAIN] = switch to TR-REC mode → [REC] → [SUB PAD] + pads to silently select samples → [CTRL2] = pitch / [CTRL3] = velocity → press step buttons 1–16 to place on steps. [DEL] = erase mode (hold pad to erase). Press [EXIT] 2× to finish

Step edit (TR-REC): Knobs during TR-REC: [CTRL1] = SUBSTEP (divide steps) or HOLD STEP (length), [CTRL2] = PITCH (-12–+12), [CTRL3] = VELOCITY (0–127). [PITCH/SPEED] = chromatic pitch mode per step. [SHIFT] + [CTRL1] = BPM, [SHIFT] + [CTRL2] = SHUFFLE (-50–+50), [SHIFT] + [CTRL3] = START offset (-50–99%)
Pattern bank selection: Press bank [A/F]–[E/J] buttons to switch. Banks A–E lit solid / F–J blinking. Each bank holds 16 patterns independently. [SHIFT] + bank = set all pads in that bank to same bus

Bus routing (REMAIN + pad): Hold [REMAIN] long → pads show color (orange=BUS1, green=BUS2, white=DRY). Press pad to toggle: BUS 1/2 ↔ DRY. Hold bank button = set all pads in bank to same bus. [BUS FX] toggles which bus to edit (lit=BUS1, blinking=BUS2)

Effect configs: Press effect buttons: [FILTER+DRIVE], [RESONATOR], [DELAY], [ISOLATOR], [DJFX LOOPER], [MFX] → turns effect on. [CTRL1]–[CTRL3] = main params. While holding [VALUE] + [CTRL1]–[CTRL3] = sub-params. [SHIFT] + [MARK] 3 sec = save BUS 1/2 effect params
Envelope (volume shape): [SHIFT] + [PITCH/SPEED] → select pad → [CTRL1] = ATTACK (0–127, 0–3 sec fade-in) / [CTRL2] = HOLD (1–100% playback range) / [CTRL3] = RELEASE (0–127, 0–3 sec fade-out)

Chopping (CHOP): Set markers first: during sample playback press [MARK] to place splits. Then [SHIFT] + [START/END] → [VALUE] = ASSIGN TO PAD → select empty pads to assign chunks → [CTRL2] = select marker → turn [VALUE] to arrange → [MARK] to confirm

Bouncing (BOUNCE): [PATTERN SELECT] → select pattern to convert → [COPY] → hold [HOLD] + pads = select pattern chain → [COPY] → press empty blue pad to save as new sample. Auto-bypasses all BUS 1–4 effects. Can use bank buttons + [CTRL3] to assign to different project

Muting: Press [REVERSE] + pad = toggle mute on/off (muted = red, unmuted = white). [REVERSE] + [REMAIN] = PAD MUTE MODE (latches mute state). [SHIFT] + [BUS FX] = MUTE BUS (mutes BUS 1/2 input, leaves reverb/delay tails)

Mute events (PAD MUTE MOTION): Record: [PATTERN SELECT] → select pattern → [REC] → [SHIFT] + [REVERSE] + [REMAIN] = PAD MUTE MODE (MOTION REC) → press pads to mute/unmute while pattern plays → [EXIT] to finish. Delete all: [PATTERN EDIT] → select pattern → [DEL] + [REVERSE]. Delete specific: same PAD MUTE MODE → press [DEL] → press pads you want to erase from while listening

Real-time recording: <kbd>[PATTERN SELECT]</kbd> → select empty red pad → <kbd>[REMAIN]</kbd> lit (not blinking) = Real-Time mode → <kbd>[REC]</kbd> → press pads freely to record notes in real time. Press <kbd>[HOLD]</kbd> + pad = latch trigger. <kbd>[ROLL]</kbd> + pad = rapid repeated hits

EFX Motion Rec: <kbd>[PATTERN SELECT]</kbd> → select pattern → <kbd>[PLAY]</kbd> to play → <kbd>[REC]</kbd> → <kbd>[MARK]</kbd> → operate effect buttons / CTRL knobs to automate → <kbd>[EXIT]</kbd>. Deletes with <kbd>[DEL]</kbd> + <kbd>[MARK]</kbd> during pattern edit

DJ mode: <kbd>[D/I]</kbd> + <kbd>[E/J]</kbd> simultaneously → assigns CH1 (left channel) and CH2 (right channel) → <kbd>[CTRL1]</kbd> = CH1 level, <kbd>[CTRL2]</kbd> = CH2 level, <kbd>[CTRL3]</kbd> = crossfade. <kbd>[ROLL]</kbd> + pad[13/15] = loop/roll CH1/CH2. <kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + pad = play from marker position

Live FX swap: <kbd>[REMAIN]</kbd> + <kbd>[BUS FX]</kbd> = swaps BUS 1 ↔ BUS 2 effects in real time (parameter values preserved). Hold <kbd>[REMAIN]</kbd> 3 sec → LIVE MODE (disables all edit buttons for stage safety)

tips: TR-REC REHEARSAL: press [REC] once to record, press again to switch to rehearsal (loops without recording) — practice before committing
EFX Motion Rec: [REC] → [MARK] during pattern playback; effect on/off and CTRL knob moves get recorded per-beat to the pattern
BATCH EDIT: hold [REMAIN] + edit any pitch/speed/envelope param → changes all pads in same bank simultaneously — fastest way to set BPM SYNC or LOOP on all samples
BANK PROTECT ([SHIFT]+[COPY]): protects from copy/delete/overwrite — enable before live gig so you can't accidentally wipe a pad
EFFECT GRAB ([VALUE] + effect button): effect fires only while button held — use for controlled bursts of reverb, scatter, filter during performance
CHOP ([SHIFT]+[START/END]): auto-split sample at existing markers → assigns each chunk to a new pad. Set markers first with [MARK] during playback
